rig.scale_semantics: scale is a multiplier on placement.target.w/h; default 1.0. New renderers may ignore it when using target.w/h directly.
rig.render_rule: For each equipped layer, choose placement.targets_by_slot[equippedSlot] when present, otherwise placement.target. Center the trimmed sprite at target.cx/cy times the 512 frame and fit it inside target.w/h times the frame using BoxFit.contain, preserving aspect ratio. Sort layers by z_index.
